notes: Reworked the app into a cleaner OBS Alert Studio flow with refreshed dark UI across alert, goal, and donation list tools.
Added real template management for Donation Goals and unified Donation Lists with create, clone, edit, delete, preview, and design pages.
Improved Donation Alert templates with better simulator flow, stronger display timing and animation behavior, and more reliable OBS playback.
Fixed leaderboard and daily-top counting so rankings now follow total donated amounts correctly and refresh more reliably on display pages.
Added desktop logging, packaged error-report export, and shared backend/frontend version syncing from one release version.
Added packaged app update support with a built-in GitHub update feed, release notes, download/install flow, and safer persistent user data across app updates.
Improved Windows packaging and release tooling, including build fixes, publish scripts, and clearer build-to-production documentation.
